evidence: "As a Die Hard series fan, I totally enjoyed this movie..."
"This movie is for people who have partied too much and want to sedate themselves."
"This movie has a captivating style and a great, consistent and sometimes even witty storyline."
"Great plot, great action, great script! This movie is totally entertaining."
"It made me feel I was there, and it felt very real."
"The graphics and music score (e.g. crazy train) are great."
"I cannot believe that the director Justin Lin has never been to Japan before..."
"As a Die Hard series fan, I totally enjoyed this movie..."
"I ended up reading all the Harry Potter books."
"The graphics and music score (e.g. crazy train) are great."
"...you could feel the mass of each car in a way computer generated images can never make you feel."
"This surprisingly well done movie shows us a man with ambition in the wild continent of Africa."
"If you are like me and many other people who are more or less played by fate..."

summary: The user enjoys action and drama films, particularly those with strong narratives and high production quality. They appreciate fast pacing and emotional depth, often favoring films that evoke a strong sensory experience.
